title: heterophragma roxburghii
intro: Heterophragma roxburghii is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Bignoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Heterophragma roxburghii can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
